fuses.description: (BACK-UP LP/ DRL 2) Daytime running lights (DRL module), Reverse lights, Park/Neutral Position Switch (Automatic Transmission), Back-Up Lamp Switch (Manual Transmission), Transmission solenoid assembly, Automatic Day / Night rearview mirror, 4-Door Cab: Passenger door lock switch

(INT.LAMPS) Interior lights, Dome Lamp, Cargo (luggage) area lamp #1 and #2. Reading and courtesy lamps, Map lamps (left and right), Glove box lamp and switch, Instrument panel / cluster, Underhood Lamp / switch, Power Mirror switch (Down/Up, Left/Right, left and right mirrors), Data link connector (DLC), Overhead console
(ABS/RWAL) Anti-lock braking system (ABS), Rear wheel anti-lock sensor

(PWR LOCK) Power door lock switch, Central timer module, Power / electric windows, Driver door lock switch, Driver door lock motor / Ajar switch, Passenger door lock switch, Passenger power lock / window switch, Driver Unlock relay

(PARK LP) Headlamp Switch, Tail Lights, City Lamp, Stop Lamp (brake lights), License plate Lamp, A/C Heater Control, Heater Control (except A/C), Ash receiver lamp, Radio, Instrument Cluster, Dimmer switch (See also Fuse #5)

fuses.description: (CLUSTER 1) Instrument panel / cluster (speedometer control, tachometer control, engine coolant temp. guage control, fuel gauge control, check indicator gauges control, low fuel indicator control, engine oil press. gauge control etc.)
(AIR BAG) Airbag control module, Passenger Airbag On/Off switch indicator
(PWR AMP) Instrument Panel / cluster, Power Amplifier

(PANEL DIM] / [ILLUM.) Panel lamps feed, A/C Heater control (high, medium, low speed, max. defrost), Heater control (except A/C), Ash receiver lamp, Radio (audio system (see also Fuse #8)), Instrument panel / cluster, Shift bezel lamp (See also Fuse #14)
(WIPER) Wiper and Washer, Wiper Relay, Multi-Function Switch, Central Timer Module, Windshield Wiper Motor, Windshield Washer pump, Intermittent wiper mode sense
(REAR DEFOG/FRT BLOWER MTR) Blower motor relay, Air Conditioner compressor clutch relay, Rear window defogger /defroster

fuses.description: (TURN SIGNAIS / HAZARD LP) Combination Flasher - Hazard warning lights (4 ways lights), turn signals (blinkers) (see also Fuse #16)
(O/H CONSOLE/PURGE) EVAP/ Proportional Purge solenoid, Overhead Console, Central Timer Module, Automatic Day / Night mirror; 4.7L California - Oxygen sensor Upstream and Downstream heater relay,
Horn relay (honk, beeper), High Note Horn, Low Note Horn
Combination Flasher relay - Turn signals (blinkers), warning hazard lights (see also relay CF - in additional "fuse / relay block" under the dash)
(PWR WND'S) Power window switch, Power door lock switch, Driver door window motor
(PWR WND'S) Power window switch, Power door lock switch, Driver door window motor
